name: Wells Fargo Reflect® Card
title: Wells Fargo Reflect® Card (Wells Fargo)
text:
Card: Wells Fargo Reflect® Card (Wells Fargo)
Best for balance transfers
Pros: No annual fee.,Long Intro APR,Cell phone protection.
Cons: No points or cash rewards earning potential.,No welcome bonus.
Why we chose it: If you’re anticipating a large purchase or have existing credit card debt, you can leverage the Wells Fargo Reflect’s credit card offer. There’s no annual fee, and you’ll enjoy a 0% introductory APR on purchases and qualifying balance transfers for 21 months from account opening. After the introductory period, you’ll face a variable APR of 17.49%, 23.99%, or 28.24%, depending on your creditworthiness.
Who it's good for: This card is a great choice for those who are looking to avoid paying interest through a terrific introductory APR offer.
Annual fee: $0
Recommended credit: 670-850
APR: Refer to Important Credit Terms,17.49%, 23.99%, or 28.24% Variable APR,0% intro APR for 21 months from account opening on qualifying balance transfers,17.49%, 23.99%, or 28.24% Variable APR,0% intro APR for 21 months from account opening on purchases
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/wells-fargo-reflect-card-review
